case_number: criminal bail application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.687 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 09.09.2025 Applicant present in person. None present for the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. SIP Nizamullah of PS Ferozabad. ------------------------------- Applicant is present in person and submits that the matter has been settled out of the Court and he does not wish to press this lis any longer. The bailable warrants issued against the applicant are hereby recalled. This criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. J U D G E Asif
